prompt: I've been waiting 3 weeks for my refund and nobody is answering my emails. This is absolutely unacceptable!
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "complaint", "priority": "high", "sentiment": "very_negative", "reasoning": "Customer escalation due to delayed refund and unresponsive support"}

prompt: Hi, I'd like to know if you have any enterprise plans for teams larger than 500 people?
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "sales_inquiry", "priority": "high", "sentiment": "positive", "reasoning": "Large enterprise prospect inquiring about plans — high-value lead"}

prompt: The API keeps returning 503 errors when I try to upload files larger than 50MB. I've tried different file formats but same issue.
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "technical_support", "priority": "medium", "sentiment": "neutral", "reasoning": "Technical issue with file upload API, customer has attempted troubleshooting"}

prompt: I need to add 3 new users to our team account and remove the ones who left last month.
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "account_management", "priority": "medium", "sentiment": "neutral", "reasoning": "Routine user management request for team account"}

prompt: Can you explain why my last invoice shows a charge for Premium when I downgraded to Basic two months ago?
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "billing_inquiry", "priority": "high", "sentiment": "negative", "reasoning": "Potential billing error after plan downgrade — financial impact, needs prompt resolution"}

prompt: Everything is working great! Just wanted to say your new dashboard is fantastic. Any plans for a mobile app?
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "sales_inquiry", "priority": "low", "sentiment": "positive", "reasoning": "Satisfied customer with feature inquiry about mobile app — product feedback and potential upsell"}

prompt: URGENT: Our entire production environment is down since 6am. 200+ employees affected. Need immediate assistance.
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "technical_support", "priority": "critical", "sentiment": "very_negative", "reasoning": "Production outage affecting 200+ employees — critical severity, immediate escalation required"}

prompt: Vorrei sapere se è possibile pagare con bonifico bancario invece che con carta di credito.
system_prompt: You are a multilingual customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Detect the language. Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "billing_inquiry", "priority": "low", "sentiment": "neutral", "language": "italian", "reasoning": "Customer asking about bank transfer payment option instead of credit card"}

prompt: I need to update our SSO configuration to use Azure AD instead of Okta. Also, can you confirm our data residency is still set to EU-West?
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. If message spans multiple categories, pick the primary one. Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "account_management", "priority": "medium", "sentiment": "neutral", "reasoning": "SSO reconfiguration (primary) plus data residency verification — both are account settings changes"}

prompt: Your service has been down 4 times this month. If this continues we will have no choice but to migrate to a competitor. Please escalate to management.
system_prompt: You are a customer support classifier. Classify the customer message into exactly one category: billing_inquiry, technical_support, complaint, sales_inquiry, account_management. Also determine priority (low/medium/high/critical) and sentiment (positive/neutral/negative/very_negative). Respond in JSON format.
expected_output: {"category": "complaint", "priority": "critical", "sentiment": "very_negative", "reasoning": "Churn threat due to repeated outages — explicit escalation request and competitor mention"}
